title: The Future of Instant Payments in the US
excerpt: Matera CEO and Co-Founder, Carlos Netto was featured in the Fintech Times to share insights on how instant payments may evolve in the US.
body:
Matera CEO and Co-Founder, Carlos Netto was featured in the Fintech Times to share insights on how instant payments may evolve in the US based on his first hand experience with Pix in Brazil.

Read the full article [here](https://thefintechtimes.com/the-story-of-pix-and-what-us-banks-can-learn/).
